auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Beehiiv API key used as a bearer token. Create it from Settings > Integrations > API in your Beehiiv account: https://developers.beehiiv.com/welcome/create-an-api-key.

actions.name: get_post
actions.description: Fetch one Beehiiv post by ID with optional statistics or content expansion.

publicationId.description: Beehiiv publication ID that owns the post.

expand.description: Post fields to expand in the Beehiiv response. HTML content expansions can make responses large.

premiumTiers.description: Premium tier display names used to scope expanded post content.

inputSchema.description: Path and query parameters for fetching a Beehiiv post.

anyOf.description: Post subtitle.

created.description: Post creation time as seconds since the Unix epoch.

anyOf.description: Post publish time as seconds since the Unix epoch.
Post displayed date as seconds since the Unix epoch.

split_tested.description: Whether the post was split tested.

anyOf.description: Email subject line for the post.
Email preview text for the post.
Post slug.
Post thumbnail URL.
Public web URL for the post.

audience.description: Audience that can access the post.

platform.description: Platform where the post is published.

content_tags.description: Content tags associated with the post.

web.description: Web HTML rendered to a free reader.

email.description: Email HTML rendered to a free reader.

rss.description: RSS HTML rendered for the post.

web.description: Web HTML rendered to a premium reader.

email.description: Email HTML rendered to a premium reader.

stats.description: Expanded post statistics returned by Beehiiv.

actions.name: get_publication
actions.description: Fetch one Beehiiv publication by ID with optional statistics expansion.

expand.description: Publication fields to expand in the Beehiiv response.

inputSchema.description: Path and query parameters for fetching a Beehiiv publication.

referral_program_enabled.description: Whether the referral program is enabled.

created.description: Publication creation time as seconds since the Unix epoch.

anyOf.description: Subscription count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.

active_subscriptions.description: Total active free and premium subscriptions.

anyOf.description: Subscription count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Subscription count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Average open rate.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Average click-through rate.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Email count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Open count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Click count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.

actions.name: get_subscription
actions.description: Fetch one Beehiiv subscription by ID with optional expansions.

publicationId.description: Beehiiv publication ID that owns the subscription.

expand.description: Subscription fields to expand in the Beehiiv response.

inputSchema.description: Path and query parameters for fetching a Beehiiv subscription by ID.

created.description: Subscription creation time as seconds since the Unix epoch.

subscription_premium_tiers.description: Premium tiers associated with the subscription.

anyOf.description: Subscription UTM source.
Subscription UTM medium.
Subscription UTM channel.
Subscription UTM campaign.
Referring site captured for the subscription.
Referral code assigned to the subscription.
Stripe customer ID associated with the subscription.

emails_received.description: Total emails sent to the subscriber.

value.description: Custom field value returned by Beehiiv.

custom_fields.description: Custom fields set on the subscription.

newsletter_lists.description: Newsletter list IDs the subscription is actively subscribed to.

actions.name: list_posts
actions.description: List Beehiiv posts for a publication with documented filters and optional expansions.

publicationId.description: Beehiiv publication ID whose posts should be listed.

expand.description: Post fields to expand in the Beehiiv response. HTML content expansions can make responses large.

contentTags.description: Content tags used to filter returned posts.

slugs.description: Post slugs used to filter returned posts.

authors.description: Author names used to filter returned posts.

premiumTiers.description: Premium tier display names used to filter returned posts and expanded content.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Beehiiv documents a range from 1 to 100 and defaults to 10.

page.description: Offset-based page number for Beehiiv pagination.

orderBy.description: Field used to sort Beehiiv posts.

direction.description: Sort direction for the Beehiiv request.

hiddenFromFeed.description: Filter by whether posts are hidden from the feed.

inputSchema.description: Path and query parameters for listing Beehiiv posts.

anyOf.description: Post subtitle.

created.description: Post creation time as seconds since the Unix epoch.

anyOf.description: Post publish time as seconds since the Unix epoch.
Post displayed date as seconds since the Unix epoch.

split_tested.description: Whether the post was split tested.

anyOf.description: Email subject line for the post.
Email preview text for the post.
Post slug.
Post thumbnail URL.
Public web URL for the post.

audience.description: Audience that can access the post.

platform.description: Platform where the post is published.

content_tags.description: Content tags associated with the post.

web.description: Web HTML rendered to a free reader.

email.description: Email HTML rendered to a free reader.

rss.description: RSS HTML rendered for the post.

web.description: Web HTML rendered to a premium reader.

email.description: Email HTML rendered to a premium reader.

stats.description: Expanded post statistics returned by Beehiiv.

limit.description: Number of objects requested per page.

total_pages.description: Total number of offset pagination pages.

actions.name: list_publications
actions.description: List Beehiiv publications associated with the API key, with optional sorting and expansion.

expand.description: Publication fields to expand in the Beehiiv response.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Beehiiv documents a range from 1 to 100 and defaults to 10.

page.description: Offset-based page number for Beehiiv pagination.

direction.description: Sort direction for the Beehiiv request.

orderBy.description: Field used to sort Beehiiv publications.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Beehiiv publications.

referral_program_enabled.description: Whether the referral program is enabled.

created.description: Publication creation time as seconds since the Unix epoch.

anyOf.description: Subscription count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.

active_subscriptions.description: Total active free and premium subscriptions.

anyOf.description: Subscription count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Subscription count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Average open rate.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Average click-through rate.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Email count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Open count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.
Click count.
False when Beehiiv did not include this stat.

limit.description: Number of objects requested per page.

total_pages.description: Total number of offset pagination pages.

actions.name: list_subscriptions
actions.description: List Beehiiv subscriptions for a publication with cursor pagination and documented filters.

publicationId.description: Beehiiv publication ID whose subscriptions should be listed.

expand.description: Subscription fields to expand in the Beehiiv response.

premiumTiers.description: Premium tier names used to filter returned subscriptions.

premiumTierIds.description: Premium tier IDs used to filter returned subscriptions.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Beehiiv documents a range from 1 to 100 and defaults to 10.

page.description: Offset-based page number for Beehiiv pagination.

email.description: Email address used to find a matching subscription.

orderBy.description: Field used to sort Beehiiv subscriptions.

direction.description: Sort direction for the Beehiiv request.

creationDate.description: Creation date filter in YYYY/MM/DD format.

inputSchema.description: Path and query parameters for listing Beehiiv subscriptions.

created.description: Subscription creation time as seconds since the Unix epoch.

subscription_premium_tiers.description: Premium tiers associated with the subscription.

anyOf.description: Subscription UTM source.
Subscription UTM medium.
Subscription UTM channel.
Subscription UTM campaign.
Referring site captured for the subscription.
Referral code assigned to the subscription.
Stripe customer ID associated with the subscription.

emails_received.description: Total emails sent to the subscriber.

value.description: Custom field value returned by Beehiiv.

custom_fields.description: Custom fields set on the subscription.

newsletter_lists.description: Newsletter list IDs the subscription is actively subscribed to.

limit.description: Number of objects requested per page.

page.description: Current offset pagination page when returned by Beehiiv.

total_results.description: Total number of matching objects when returned by Beehiiv.

total_pages.description: Total number of offset pagination pages when returned by Beehiiv.

anyOf.description: Cursor token for the next page of results.
